landing.title: Openpot
landing.subtitle: Secure Session Tracker
landing.heroDescription: A premium, zero-knowledge session tracker built for complete anonymity. Your data stays on your device. Cryptographically invisible to the world.
landing.noTelemetry: No accounts. No telemetry. Fully Local-First.

features.f1Desc: We never see your data because we never touch it. No accounts, no database, no logs.
features.f2Desc: Everything runs inside your browser's secure context. Offline-ready and cryptographically private.
features.f3Desc: Install directly to your home screen. Experience a native feel without the surveillance of App Stores.

community.title: Join the community.
community.desc: Stay updated on new features and private tracking protocols. We promise: No tracking, no spam.
